definition: Take in or soak up.
context: The sponge will absorb the spilled water.

definition: Begin to move more quickly.
context: The car began to accelerate down the hill.

definition: A thing which can be added to something else to make it more useful.
context: She bought a matching accessory for her outfit.

definition: Provide lodging or sufficient space for.
context: The hotel can accommodate up to 500 guests.

definition: Gather together or acquire an increasing number or quantity of.
context: Dust tends to accumulate in the corners.

definition: Successfully bring about or reach a desired objective.
context: With hard work, you can achieve your goals.

definition: The properties or qualities of a room or building that determine how sound is transmitted in it.
context: The concert hall has excellent acoustics.

definition: Buy or obtain an asset or object.
context: He managed to acquire a rare stamp.

definition: A person who engages in a pursuit on an unpaid rather than a professional basis.
context: The tournament is open to both professional and amateur players.

definition: Open to more than one interpretation.
context: The politician gave an ambiguous answer to the question.

definition: Not identified by name.
context: The donor wished to remain anonymous.

definition: The technical equipment or machinery needed for a particular activity.
context: The scientist set up the apparatus for the experiment.

definition: Clearly visible or understood.
context: It became apparent that he was lying.

definition: The way that someone or something looks.
context: She checks her appearance in the mirror.

definition: Recognize the full worth of.
context: I appreciate your help with this project.

definition: The art or practice of designing and constructing buildings.
context: He studied Roman architecture in college.

definition: The branch of mathematics dealing with the properties and manipulation of numbers.
context: Mental arithmetic is a useful skill.

definition: The action of assassinating someone.
context: The assassination of the king started a war.

definition: The evaluation or estimation of the nature, quality, or ability of someone or something.
context: The teacher gave a fair assessment of the student's work.

definition: Connect with something else in one's mind.
context: People often associate rain with sadness.

definition: The envelope of gases surrounding the earth or another planet.
context: The meteor burned up in the Earth's atmosphere.

definition: The assembled spectators or listeners at a public event.
context: The audience clapped loudly at the end of the play.

definition: The season after summer and before winter.
context: The leaves turn brown in the autumn.

definition: Providing supplementary or additional help and support.
context: The hospital has a backup auxiliary power unit.

definition: Able to be used or obtained.
context: Fresh fruit is always available at the market.

definition: A man who is not and has never been married.
context: He is a wealthy bachelor.

definition: A small colored rubber bag which is inflated with air.
context: The child let go of the red balloon.

definition: The state of being completely lacking in a particular quality or value.
context: The company faced bankruptcy after the scandal.

definition: A meal or gathering at which meat, fish, or other food is cooked out of doors on a rack over an open fire.
context: We are having a backyard barbecue this Sunday.

definition: Pleasing the senses or mind aesthetically.
context: She wore a beautiful gown to the dance.

definition: The point in time or space at which something starts.
context: That was just the beginning of their journey.

definition: The way in which one acts or conducts oneself.
context: His bad behavior got him sent to the principal.

definition: Accept that something is true.
context: I believe that honesty is the best policy.

definition: Favorable or advantageous.
context: Eating vegetables is beneficial to your health.

definition: A line that marks the limits of an area.
context: The river forms the natural boundary between the two countries.

definition: A cultivated variety of cabbage bearing heads of green or purplish flower buds.
context: She steamed some broccoli for dinner.

definition: A short official statement or broadcast summary of news.
context: The news anchor read the latest weather bulletin.

definition: A system of government in which most of the important decisions are made by state officials.
context: He was frustrated by the endless paperwork and bureaucracy.

definition: A chart or series of pages showing the days, weeks, and months of a particular year.
context: Mark the date on your calendar.

definition: Work in an organized and active way toward a particular goal.
context: They started a campaign to save the local park.

definition: A person who applies for a job or is nominated for election.
context: She is the best candidate for the managerial position.

definition: A class or division of people or things regarded as having particular shared characteristics.
context: This book belongs in the fiction category.

definition: A burial ground.
context: They placed flowers on the grave at the cemetery.

definition: Irregular; inconstant.
context: The weather in April is very changeable.

definition: Typical of a particular person, place, or thing.
context: Stripes are a characteristic feature of zebras.

definition: A person with whom one works.
context: My colleague helped me finish the presentation.

definition: An upright pillar.
context: The ancient temple was supported by marble columns.

definition: A group of people appointed for a specific function.
context: The safety committee will review the new protocols.

definition: A formal promise or assurance.
context: The television comes with a one-year guarantee.

definition: Subject to aggressive pressure or intimidation.
context: It is illegal to harass someone in the workplace.
